name: small law offices managing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For small law offices processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient contract management causes compliance issues. We streamline contract management instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient contract management leading to compliance issues
